calendar.matters:
Motion For Cease And Desist
Off Calendar Jan-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Josiah Larkin telephone number 415-819-5244 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENTS ANSHU BANSAL AND ABHISHEK ARORA'S Motion For Cease And Desist is denied. There is no legal, statutory, or evidentiary basis for the request. In addition, the arbitrator currently has jurisdiction to resolve the parties' dispute. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Of Hearing On Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Decision
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Josiah Larkin telephone number 415-819-5244 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Anshu Bansal telephone number 206-676-2061 Defendant in Propria Persona.
Abhishek Arora telephone number 909-223-2913 Defendant in Propria Persona appeared by telephone.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER JOSIAH LARKIN'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Decision is granted. The Court has the power to confirm an interim award. See Roehl v. Ritchie (2007) 147 Cal.App.4th 338, 351; Hightower v. Superior Court (2001) 86 Cal.App.4th 1415, 1431. The Court confirms the award because respondent fails to demonstrate any basis to vacate it pursuant to CCP 1286.2. See CCP 1286. The Court will prepare an order that tracks the tentative ruling.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Petition To Confirm Emergency Arbitration Decision
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER JOSIAH LARKIN'S Petition To Confirm Emergency Arbitration Decision is Off calendar. No proof of service was provided or filed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg
